title: dianthus tenuiflorus
intro: Dianthus tenuiflorus, also known as the slender-fruited pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a useful treatment for wounds and skin conditions. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Dianthus tenuiflorus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in salves and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
